episodes.title: Victims Expose The Ramp Cult – Karen Wheaton Stays Silent While Promoting Summer Camps #theramp
episodes.description:
Karen Wheaton is still begging parents to send their children and teenagers to The Ramp Summer Camps… while numerous victims have now come forward with stories of abuse they suffered while underage at her ministry.

Her own son-in-law, Samuel Bentley — the man she put in charge as second in command — admitted to s**ually abusing minors. At least 8 known child predators have been on staff. And Karen Wheaton has not said ONE WORD about any of it.

Instead, she’s liquidating properties and aggressively marketing these camps:

June 25-27  
July 9-11  
July 23-25

Thousands of kids are already signed up because their families don’t know the truth.

This is not a ministry. This is a cult that has been covering up the s**ual assault of children for over 20 years.

We cannot let more kids be put in danger.

Share this video with every parent you know. Repost it everywhere. Tag your friends, your church, anyone planning to send their children to these camps.

The only way we stop more victims is if the truth reaches families before June 25th.

Full investigation dropping now.

#hamiltonal #alabama #tennessee #alabamanews #theramp #karenwheaton

episodes.description:
🚨 Did you know there's a fully operating CULT in small-town Hamilton, Alabama — with outposts in Chattanooga and the UK — disguised as a fiery Christian ministry?
For over 20 years, Karen Wheaton’s “The Ramp” has been preying on passionate young believers while allegedly covering up the sexual abuse of children. Now her own son-in-law and second-in-command, Samuel Bentley, has finally admitted to sexually abusing at least TWO minors. He was declared a “prophet” by Wheaton… until the victims spoke up.
In this explosive investigation:

Students pay $4,500+ per semester for an unaccredited “college” where they’re forced into 30+ hours of unpaid manual labor, fined if they don’t comply, and left starving in substandard housing.
Multi-millions raised for promised projects that never happened — classic ministry fraud.
Altar calls demanding personal allegiance to Karen Wheaton herself.
Deep ties to controversial figures like Perry Stone.
Hypnotic worship, emotional manipulation, and a culture of silence around abuse.

This isn’t revival. This is control. This is exploitation.
Karen Wheaton has built a personal empire on the backs — and trauma — of vulnerable youth. The Alabama SBI is now investigating. Survivors are coming forward. The truth is finally breaking through.
If you or someone you know was involved with The Ramp, Ramp University, or Karen Wheaton — comment below, share your story, and get out.
Share this video. The more people see it, the harder it is for them to keep covering it up. #foryou  #truthrecon  #truecrimepodcast #cultexposed #theramp
